title: As Rents Soar, Londoners Turn to Vacant Pubs, Offices and Police Stations
summary_full: Property guardianship, in which residents live in otherwise vacant buildings, used to be considered edgy. But as the rental market tightens, more people are embracing the arrangement.
summary_public: Property guardianship, in which residents live in otherwise vacant buildings, used to be considered edgy. But as the rental market tightens, more people are embracing the arrangement.
